name: FORNEXT Inc.
notes:
We operate a 'peering proxy' which provide a virtual peering network for the our customer AS to make it easier to reap the benefits of peering.
 Our peering proxy network has difference from other transit services and basically advertises customers routes without adding our ASN(131948) to AS_PATH attribute. Please set like a 'enforce-first-as disable' to our peering session, like to the route servers if your router needed to accept those routes.
